title: Stachys bakeri
taxonomy: Stachys bakeri is classified within the family Lamiaceae. This classification places Stachys bakeri among the mint family, which consists of diverse species of flowering plants. intro: Stachys bakeri, also known as Betony, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae).
